subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in Berlin | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-4925
body: Please note the apollo stream in Berlin has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Nikola Tesla. Reference initiative INIT-4925. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: urban-watch, quality.
